stemHtml: Wake turbulence is greatest when an aircraft is (1) _____, (2) _____ and (3) _____.

options.a: (1) large, (2) heavy, (3) at maximum speed in full flaps configuration.
options.b: (1)small, (2) light, (3) at maximum speed in full flaps configuration.
options.c: (1) large, (2) heavy, (3) at low speed in clean configuration.
options.d: (1) small, (2) light, (3) at low speed in clean configuration.
